description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat, dark-colored roof and a white exterior, surrounded by a low white picket fence. The property includes a rectangular swimming pool and a small basketball court, both set in a paved yard. Two large red-and-white patio umbrellas provide shaded seating near the pool, enhancing the outdoor leisure area. The main building has clean, geometric lines with minimal ornamentation, and a small covered entryway is visible. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped and others isolated, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout is compact, with clear zones for recreation, relaxation, and entry.
description: A modern, white bungalow with a flat dark roof, pool, basketball court, and shaded patio seating within a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Shows the side of the bungalow with the basketball court, pool, and two red-and-white umbrellas; the building's flat roof and white fence are prominent.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, steps, and the patio area with umbrellas and pool directly in front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the paved area, and the umbrellas from behind; minimal windows visible.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, focusing on the roof, basketball court, and the back fence; less detail of the pool and umbrellas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and isolated windows
